offer: For bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks, manual entry of daily sales data causes time delays and potential errors. We automate the conversion of sales data into journal entries instead of manual data entry into QuickBooks.
problem: Manual entry of daily sales data into accounting systems is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for bookkeepers seeking solutions
Share insights on Indie Hackers about similar issues
DM outreach to bookkeepers with demo video links
Engage in community forums focused on bookkeeping tools
try_it: Let users try daily sales data import and journal entry generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving of common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing sales data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
